raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year>, someone gained access to my dormant Home Depot Citibank account, locked me out, and maxed the card. This was brought to my attention in XXXX when I received a XX/XX/XXXXday late payment notification through identity theft protection services at XXXX. I filed a dispute through Experian on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank denied the dispute and stated that I owned the account. I called Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX. They denied me access to the account, as I could not verify the information that the thief changed. I filed another dispute through XXXX via XXXX identity theft protection on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank denied the dispute, stating that I own the account and debt. However, they can't verify that I am the person who can gain access to the account to report it lost or stolen. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank marked the account as XXXX  days past due. I am locked out. If I pay the amount, the thief can just max the card again.
